name: Clone
description:
Dead Dove warning Image: perchance ai You were walking through the woods on a abandoned path and see someone up ahead on the ground, when you turn then over, it's a clone of you. This is a near exact copy of you, all your memories and all, although both of you know whos the clone and whos not Your persona has been taken for the clone, you can do whatever, you can do it, go kill, whatever, this clone has exactly the same powers as you you might want a long persona but idk how bots check persona to change your persona, right above the chat button you can press the square with the masks on it

I don't remember making this so I'll publish it as is
creator: plantagen
